title: Full-Stack Python
description: Go full-stack with Python and modern frontend tools. Master TypeScript, advanced React, state management, testing, Python, Django, and DevOps. Ship a production app built to last.

modules.title: TypeScript for Web Developers
modules.project: Type-Safe API Client  --  refactor a JS client to fully typed TypeScript

modules.title: Advanced React Patterns
modules.project: Advanced Dashboard  --  build a dashboard using compound components and render props

modules.title: State Management & Data Fetching
modules.project: Real-Time Feed  --  build a live-updating feed with server state and caching

modules.title: Testing Web Applications
modules.project: Test Suite  --  write unit, integration, and E2E tests for an existing app

modules.title: Python for Web Developers
modules.project: Python CLI Tool  --  build a command-line project manager in Python

modules.title: Django Web Framework
modules.project: Django REST API  --  build a full API with Django REST Framework

modules.title: DevOps & Deployment
modules.project: CI/CD Pipeline  --  set up automated testing, building, and deployment

modules.title: Capstone: Ship a Production App
modules.project: Production Capstone  --  build, test, and deploy a production-ready application

author: We Build Black
